title: hahnia aria var. angustifolia
intro: Hahnia aria var. angustifolia, also known as the Indian snakeroot or Arisem root, is a plant species native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It is a type of herbaceous perennial plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Hahnia aria var. angustifolia include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to lower fever and reduce pain, and it is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
